positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a wandering cosmic fox spirit (kitsune) surrounded by abstract celestial elements like crescent moons, shooting stars, and nebula dust. The fox should have a graceful, elegant silhouette and be centered in the frame. Use a deep indigo and ethereal lavender color palette with accents of glowing gold. The style should be highly detailed, geometric, and ethereal, similar to stained-glass or Zentangle motifs, rendered with clean black outlines on a solid cream background. High contrast, symmetrical composition, vector aesthetic, suitable for T-shirt print.
